hours.sunday: 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM (drop-off and pick-up only)
hours.holidays: Open on most public holidays — call ahead to confirm

contact.booking: Via phone, WhatsApp, or website at pawfectstay.com

services.name: Overnight Boarding (Dogs)
services.details: Private climate-controlled suites, 3 supervised outdoor play sessions daily, bedtime tuck-in, and a goodnight treat.

services.name: Overnight Boarding (Cats)
services.details: Quiet, separate cat wing. Perch windows, cozy beds, and individual playtime with staff twice daily.

services.name: Doggy Daycare (Full Day)
services.details: 7 AM to 7 PM. Supervised group play sorted by size and temperament. Midday nap time included. Perfect for working owners.

services.name: Doggy Daycare (Half Day)
services.details: Any 4-hour block within business hours. Drop-off or pick-up flexible.

services.name: Bath & Brush (Small dog under 25 lbs)
services.details: Shampoo, blow-dry, brush-out, ear cleaning, nail trim, and bandana.

services.name: Bath & Brush (Medium dog 25–60 lbs)
services.details: Same as small package. Pricing reflects coat size.

services.name: Bath & Brush (Large dog over 60 lbs)
services.details: Same as small package. May take up to 2.5 hours for large double-coated breeds.

services.name: Full Grooming (haircut + bath)
services.details: Breed-specific haircut, bath, brush-out, nail trim, ear cleaning, and spritz. Price varies by breed and coat condition.

services.name: Cat Grooming
services.details: Lion cut or sanitary trim, bath if tolerated, nail trim. By appointment only — Tuesdays and Thursdays.

services.name: Puppy's First Groom
services.details: Gentle introduction groom for puppies under 6 months. Focus on positive experience — short session, lots of treats, certificate of bravery included!

services.name: Nail Trim Only
services.details: Walk-in welcome for nail trims Mon–Fri 9 AM to 5 PM. No appointment needed.

services.name: Teeth Brushing Add-on
services.details: Add to any grooming or daycare service.

services.name: Puppy Socialisation Classes
services.details: Weekly group classes for puppies 8–16 weeks. Covers basic commands, socialisation, and leash manners. Max 6 puppies per class. Held Saturday mornings at 9 AM.

policies.vaccination_requirements: All dogs must be up to date on Rabies, DHPP (Distemper/Parvo), and Bordetella. Cats must have Rabies and FVRCP. Proof required at first visit.
policies.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice for daycare. 48-hour notice for boarding. Late cancellations may incur a 50% charge.

check_in_checkout.boarding_checkin: Any time during business hours on arrival day
check_in_checkout.boarding_checkout: By 11 AM on departure day to avoid a half-day daycare charge

policies.what_to_bring_boarding: Food (portioned per meal in labelled bags), any medications, one item from home like a blanket or toy. We provide bedding, but a familiar scent helps nervous pets.
policies.aggressive_animals: We reserve the right to refuse boarding or grooming for animals showing aggression. Safety of all animals and staff is the top priority.
policies.flea_policy: Any animal found to have fleas will receive a flea treatment at the owner's expense ($20) before joining the facility.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is there a meet and greet before boarding?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes! We strongly recommend a free 30-minute meet and greet for first-time boarders so your pet can explore the space and we can learn their routine.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Do you send updates while my pet is staying?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Absolutely. We send at least one photo update per day via WhatsApp for boarding pets, and post group daycare photos to our Instagram daily.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can I bring my pet's own food?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, and we actually prefer it. Keeping the same diet avoids tummy upsets. Please portion meals in labelled zip-lock bags.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Do you cater to senior pets or pets with special needs?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes. We have experience with senior animals and can administer oral medications (tablets/liquid) at no extra charge. Please inform us at booking.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Are the play groups supervised?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: All play sessions are fully supervised by trained staff. Dogs are grouped by size and play style, not just breed.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What if my pet gets sick during their stay?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: We will contact you immediately. We have a vet partner (Austin Animal Clinic, 0.5 miles away) and will take your pet there if needed. You will be informed before any vet visit.

loyalty_program.name: Pawfect Paws Club
loyalty_program.details: Every 10th day of daycare is free. Every 5th grooming is 20% off. Automatic — no sign-up needed, tracked by phone number.

escalation_rules: Any question about a pet's health, injury, or medical condition
Complaints about a previous visit or staff behaviour
Requests for discounts or custom pricing beyond listed packages
Questions about incidents during a stay (injury, fight, escape)
More than 2 questions in a row that cannot be answered from this SOP
Customer requests to speak to a manager or human
Concerns about a specific staff member
